reviews.comment:
Excelente atención,  sanitarios limpios y completos! Minimercado con variedad de productos, golosinas, bebidas y comidas al paso.
Su restaurante ofrece minutas y 7n excelente café, medialunas y tostados!
Efectivo débito crédito y apps

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, clean and well-equipped restrooms! Mini-market with a variety of products, sweets, drinks, and quick meals.
Their restaurant offers quick meals and excellent coffee, croissants, and toasted sandwiches! Cash, debit, credit, and apps accepted.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atencion, aunque el café estaba espantoso.
Si volves después de 10 días, es justo cuando se te pasa la acidez del café y podes parar de nuevo

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, although the coffee was awful.
If you return after 10 days, it's just when the coffee's acidity has subsided and you can stop again.
